html:
Exclusive to:

The Table Lamp is a craftable Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced within the From Beyond updates. It can be crafted in the Decorations Filter or Carpentry Filter and requires a Sawhorse to prototype.

It can be placed on a Table or on the ground and is working similar to a placed Lantern, but can't be equipped. When turned on, the Table Lamp will last 7.8 minutes when it's durability is at 100%. It can be turned off by right clicking on it or by taking it in the inventory. Fireflies will refuel it for 39%, which will last for 180 seconds, a Light Bulb refuels for 19%, which will last for 90 seconds, and Slurtle Slime fuels for 9.5%, which will last for 45 Seconds. Like a Lantern, as fuel is depleted, the light radius gradually becomes smaller. The Table Lamp does not disappear when its durability reaches 0%, however it needs to be refueled before it can be used as a source of light again.

Skins

Trivia

  • The Table Lamp was introduced in the Host of Horrors update.

Bugs

  • Table Lamps that are placed on tables will turn themselves on when the server loads.

Exclusive to:
“A welcoming light.”
–Wilson
“A torch works just as well.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang likes little light.”
–Wolfgang
“Great.”
–Wendy
“TABLE ILLUMINATION”
–WX-78
“Now i can read my books at night.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'd rather have natural light, but it'll do.”
–Woodie
“Who's afraid of the dark?”
–Maxwell
“A warrior hath no need for light!”
–Wigfrid
“It's so bright for our eyes.”
–Webber
“Lumiere!”
–Warly
“Little light”
–Wormwood
“A good lamp will keep ya workin' through the night!”
–Winona
“This little lamp's light is quite a delight.”
–Wortox
“Pretty light for table.”
–Wurt
“Turn it off when we tell ghost stories.”
–Walter
“How fast does light travel in this place?”
–Wanda

Like a Lantern, as fuel is depleted, the light radius gradually becomes smaller. summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đèn Bàn là một Vật Phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật From Beyond. Nó có thể được chế tạo trong Bộ Lọc Trang Trí hoặc Bộ Lọc Mộc và yêu cầu Ngựa Cưa để tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Table Lamp
